steps.title: Substitute the time
steps.content: The equation $d=35t$ gives the distance $d$ after $t$ seconds. For $2$ seconds, substitute $t=2$: $$d=35(2).$$

steps.title: Compute the distance
steps.content: $35(2)=70$, so the van is $70$ feet from the marker after $2$ seconds. Choice A (‘$35$’) is the $1$-second distance, and choice D (‘$105$’) is the $3$-second distance. C is correct.
